items.claim: Jared Cannonier has a power advantage over Duncan.
items.quote: caner maybe has that power advantage.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is slowing down due to age and injuries.
items.quote: Father Time is undefeated. He's had a lot of injuries. He's slowing down.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is the only UFC fighter to be knocked out in three separate weight classes.
items.quote: Only fighters to get knocked out in three separate weight classes in UFC history.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's durability is a significant issue.
Chase Hooper has given up five knockdowns in his UFC and Contender Series run.
items.quote: He's given up five knockdowns in his UFC and Contender Series run.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is highly effective at grappling once he gets an opponent to the ground.
items.quote: when he gets you to the ground, it's game over. Like, he's really good on top.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has been knocked down in every single fight.
items.quote: He's also been knocked down in every single fight.
